name: pacing
description: Analyze speech pacing: WPM per time window, energy dips, and slow sections. Suggests where tighter cuts could improve delivery.

output.description: JSON with wpm_avg, per-window segments array, and slow_sections array with timestamps

params.name: window
params.description: Window size in seconds for WPM calculation

params.name: slow-threshold
params.description: Fraction of average WPM below which a window is flagged as slow (0.7 = flag if < 70% of avg)
